meta.title: Incident Command System For ICS (ICS4ICS) Exercise at S4x22
meta.description:
This was the first live exercise of the ICS4ICS program. It uses the Incident Command System that has worked well in hurricanes, floods, and other incidents on an ICS cyber incident.

0:00  Briefing on ICS and ICS Security
7:30  Quick overview of Incident Command System
11:30  The Exercise Begins

More info available at ICS4ICS.org
